summary: Classified all five open PRs independently. The shard is an inventory bucket, not a dedupe cluster; no canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no close/merge/fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Standalone docs issue-template PR; not a duplicate, not superseded by a hydrated canonical item, and not eligible for closure or merge in this plan job.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with its own review path; no duplicate or superseded relationship is hydrated, and closure is not appropriate.
Standalone LM Studio feature PR with proof supplied; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate under the supplied artifact.
Focused channel reliability PR that needs proof/review; it should remain outside this inventory cleanup rather than be closed.
Small standalone agents display fix tied to an unhydrated linked issue; proof failure blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate treatment, but it is not a safe close candidate.
